security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://api.coingecko.com https://*.alchemy.com https://*.infura.io https://relay.gelato.digital https://api.gelato.digital https://*.zerodev.app https://api.pimlico.io https://bridge.walletconnect.org https://*.walletconnect.com https://*.walletconnect.org https://explorer-api.walletconnect.com wss://*.walletconnect.com wss://*.walletconnect.org wss://relay.walletconnect.org https://rpc.ankr.com https://eth.llamarpc.com https://cloudflare-eth.com https://api.thegraph.com https://gateway-arbitrum.network.thegraph.com; img-src 'self' data: https:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; font-src 'self' data:; frame-src 'none'; object-src 'none'

bundle.shortDescription: AI-powered non-custodial Uniswap V3 LP management
bundle.longDescription: LiqAI is a non-custodial desktop app that manages your Uniswap V3 LP positions with AI-optimised ranges. Your funds and keys never leave your wallet.
